measurable_implication: IS = explicit + delay + impact + missed opportunity
operational_value: slow fills in volatile bars increase delay cost component
execution_implication: fast aggression raises market impact; patience raises drift risk
contradiction_awareness: high edge_strength urges urgency while guards block execution
failure_awareness: VWAP average hides IS tail risk — consistency matters for survival

measurable_implication: benchmark drift between decision and fill prices
execution_implication: orders arrive at stale prices — adverse drift
contradiction_awareness: governance approved but latency guard blocked
failure_awareness: internal routing delay in volatile markets amplifies IS

measurable_implication: impact scales super-linearly when participation rate exceeds resiliency
operational_value: cap position_limit when spread + slippage guards fail together
execution_implication: large orders move price against themselves
contradiction_awareness: allocation permits size while microstructure rejects fill quality
failure_awareness: catastrophic loss often follows forced completion in thin liquidity
